name: Realife Simulator
short_description: Realife Simulator is an online life simulation where players can work, socialize, and grow by assuming different roles in a realistic city. Whether alone or with friends, freely choose a career, earn money, upgrade your vehicle, and shape city life.
detailed_description:
Before You Buy – Please Read!

Realife Simulator is not a movie. It’s not GTA, not The Sims, and not a quest-based adventure. It’s a sandbox – a living world where you do whatever you want, if you want.

There are no pop-up missions, no “You must go here!” arrows, and nobody is coming to entertain you.
Your experience is what you make of it. Some players love freedom, others need goals. Be honest with yourself!

Is This Game For You?

  • Do you love experimenting, exploring, and creating your own fun? You’ll feel at home here.

  • Do you want to just relax, try things out, or roleplay? This is your sandbox.

  • BUT, if you’re looking for a guided adventure, constant objectives, or high-action story…
    Sorry, this isn’t it. Please watch gameplay before buying!

Common Questions:

  • “What do I do in this game?”

    Whatever you want. That’s the point. You create your story.

  • “Is there a main quest or ending?”

    Nope! The game is open-ended, just like real life.

What does this mean?

  • You decide what to do: There are countless possibilities, but no one will tell you what your goal should be.

  • Create your own story: The world is a sandbox. Build, explore, roleplay, make friends or just relax.

  • No forced fun: If you want constant action, guided objectives, or cinematic missions, this game is not for you.

  • You make your own fun: The experience is what you make of it.

Before you buy:

  • This game is about player freedom and emergent gameplay.

  • If you enjoy experimenting, exploring, and creating your own goals, you’ll love Realife Simulator.

  • If you expect story-driven progression or instant action, you may be disappointed.

  • Please check system requirements and gameplay videos before purchasing.

Why do we write this?

Many refund requests are from players expecting a traditional game structure. Realife Simulator is an open sandbox  your imagination and creativity matter here!

Realife Simulator is more than just a game — it is an opportunity to step into a parallel life, one that reflects the complexity, freedom, and realism of modern society. Every decision you make, every action you take, and every role you adopt, echoes through a fully connected, multiplayer city that never sleeps.

Welcome to a place where there are no scripted characters.
No pre-written destinies.
Only real people — building real lives.

Like a real city...

A world where everyone has their own story, but where paths intersect.

Realife Simulator is not a simulation universe for a single player, but one where thousands of people live together.

You are not alone here. You never were.

The person passing by you is not a random NPC — they are a real player.

The employee you see at the market was someone else's boss an hour ago.

The man you pass on the street might arrest you an hour later.

Everyone here lives their own life.

But we all live in the same city.

🌆 Everyone is here, anything is possible

This city wasn't designed for just one person.

It's an open, dynamic system created by people living in real time.

Some go to work in the morning

Some go out into the streets at night

Some earn money through legal means

Some push the system in dark corners

Some buy the house of their dreams

Some can’t pay the rent and end up sleeping on the streets

And sometimes, they all intersect in the same place.

Everyone has a role here.

But no one's “fate” is predetermined.

🧩 Systems are interconnected, players are interdependent

Every player in Realife Simulator is a building block.

Without one, the system is incomplete.

🧑‍🍳 While one player runs a restaurant,

🚗 another delivers goods to that restaurant.

👮‍♂️ While police players patrol,

🕵️‍♂️ criminals move forward on another plan.

📉 While one goes bankrupt,

📈 another takes their place.

This isn’t just an open world.

This is a shared order.

🎯 You choose a position, not a profession

Here, a profession is not just a skin.

Every role has an impact on the system:

👮 Police: Fights crime, enforces the rules

🧑‍🔧 Mechanic: Keeps vehicles running, maintains the city's infrastructure

🚕 Taxi driver: Connects the city, increases social interaction

💼 Real Estate Agent: Manages properties, controls the market

🕴️ Criminal: Breaks the rules, creates new risks

👷 Worker: Maintains the basic system, ensures everyone's comfort

And while you play one of these roles, someone else is affecting your work.

🧠 Real people, real effects

👥 The social system works with players

💬 Real-time communication with players

🏙️ Economic balance is shaped by the people on the server

🧾 Everyone's data is recorded in the system: crimes, careers, properties, relationships

🛠️ Every new player changes the world a little more

This is not a game, it is a living organism.

And you are not just a part of it, you are also a catalyst.

🌐 Players set the rules for the servers

Each server is managed according to its own structure.

Some are free, some are more rule-oriented.

How far someone rises is entirely dependent on their own decisions and social relationships.

🎭 Everyone chooses their role, but no one writes the script.

🎤 Everyone speaks, but no one silences anyone.

📜 And everything is recorded.

🛠️ A constantly changing, never-ending world

Realife Simulator is constantly updated.

New systems, new professions, new mechanics:

📱 Player-to-player social media system

🏢 Company formation and partnerships

🏗️ Construction, production, and distribution chain

🎥 Publishing, content creation, advertising

🏘️ Neighborhood system, community structures

The space for players who want to write their own rules is growing.

And every new update creates new social balances.

🔚 FINAL WORD

This is not a life simulation.

This is a real-time universe where multiple lives flow simultaneously.

You are not alone here.

Everyone here is connected to each other.

And sometimes your small decision can completely change someone else's life.

That's why Realife Simulator:

🎮 is lived, not watched.

🛠️ DEVELOPER'S NOTE

Hello,

As I write these lines, you may have just discovered the game, or you may have already started exploring its streets.

Realife Simulator wasn't born from a single idea.

It was created from games, life, observations, and sometimes just phrases that popped into my head in the middle of the night.

My goal wasn’t to create a game that mimics real life.

It was to build a system deep enough to handle life like a game.

We wanted to create a world where not only characters but also decisions come to life.

A structure where it’s not just about the choices you make, but where those choices shape you.

This project isn’t shaped by a large team, but by a passionate vision.

There may be gaps along the way. There might even be mistakes.

But I can guarantee one thing:

We’ll keep growing this world together with you.

Your opinions, critiques, even the smallest idea can change the direction of this project.

Realife Simulator could be much more than just a game.

What it becomes—just like the game itself—is up to you.

Thank you.

Welcome to reality.
